text_block_list.name: Sky & Fuji
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Attendees
text_block_list.text:
Waaaaah!
You two are the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was so different from what I imagined! Different but...
great!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'd love to try something just like that... May I have this dance? I
bet you'll be really good at taking the lead!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! I... I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it seems our dance ignited something in everyone! The surprise
went perfectly! Now for one more thing...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're all the stars of the show now! It's party time!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, was that dance part of Rudolf's plan?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Don't ask me. It looks like they made it up on their own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They made everyone want to dance just by doing their thing... I've
got to admit, it wasn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
What I'm saying is, the one who requested the DJ time was me! I'm
sorry!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Why are you apologizing? My history with her shouldn't stop you from
doing what you want.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
It's not that... I'm sorry for being weak. I was always running in circles
because I couldn't figure out where I was going.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
I may have fallen behind, but... I really did try hard on this. I want to
make an amazing memory here, so I can have a clean break... and
move forward.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I've been narrow-minded too. This isn't just her event. It's
something more.)

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, you're "!monad," aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wha?! How the hell'd you know?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're more honest than I thought. Your profile icon is a math
formula. Looking at your laptop... I guess I just got the same kind of
feeling.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You're always wandering around the track with it. An eyesore like
that's hard to forget. I take it you're DJing. Better get ready—or
maybe you turned down the gig?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What's it matter to you?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I bet you didn't even reply to the offer. Meaning you didn't
immediately turn it down... Wow, you're still undecided?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Quit prodding me to do it. It's damn pushy... Ohh, I get it now. You
were a fan of mine, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't matter. What's definite is someone chose you, but you didn't
choose anything in the end. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It's a little pathetic. Don't you get it? Your silence isn't an answer—it's
cowardice. Unless you want your identity revealed, make your
decision... right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why is it you're trying so hard to drag me out like this?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Having your own flock is a precious thing. You should take
responsibility for making your fans love you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I don't have an outfit. If I go out like this, I'll look like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I'll get you everything you need. You're going on that stage. Just
focus on getting ready.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I hope your fashion sense isn't as bad as it looks.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Now, be a good girl and go make those memories you're looking
for.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Hm? A LANE message from Sirius? What?! N-no way!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: What is it? She okay?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
We're going to Sirius's room! We gotta get the stuff she asked for and
hightail it to the Droit!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
That was DJ Helios, everyone! Give her a round of applause for those
popping beats!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the DJ time climax! Are you having fuuun?! Get
ready for the mysterious masked DJ to make their entrance!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Next up is... er, um, I'm not supposed to read the exclamation point,
right? It's !monad, everyone! Pump it UUUP!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh... Why am I here? She wasn't serious about outing me... I'm the
one who accepted the excuse to do it. But why?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I'm normally more logical. Did Sky and Fuji do this to me? Do I want
to make people happy all of a sudden? Tch... No friggin' way.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(I've always liked music. Making my own stuff was just... to have fun. It
was a good way to shut out all the crap in the real world.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Sound was so much easier to handle than reality... So to drown out
the noise in my head, I mixed... and mixed... and mixed...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(And I threw it out into the world. It's not like I wanted people to hear
it. I just wanted to tell reality to blow off... to prove to myself...)

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: This song's the best! Amp it up for real, !monaaaad!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Argh, no more philosophizing. "Making memories" is kid stuff. I'll
pump it up, blast the volume, and turn this moment into something
mind-melting!)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Good, everyone looks happy. This music is rather intense, but we
should do DJ time again next—oh, it's those two.)

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Good thing we made it—geez, are you crying?!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... I just, this is s-so cool! Yeah, I love this. !monad's music is like
screaming your feelings out!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text:
It's cool—leave it at that! We're gonna wreck this place too. Next
time... we'll do dresses and everything!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Yeah! Hehe, then it's a date... promise!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Interesting... Pursuing my own happiness led to this scene.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(I don't have time to gaze in awe though. The participation rate was
less than ideal. I'll need to think of new measures for next time.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (Practice makes perfect. Next time everyone will enjoy this moment. I won't let anyone miss out again.)
